html:
Exclusive to:

The Anchor Kit is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Seafaring Filter, requires two Boards, three Cut Stones and three Ropes to craft, and a Think Tank to prototype.

The Anchor Kit can be deployed on a Boat. The Anchor can then be lowered to prevent the Boat from drifting, or be raised to allow it to move again. The time it takes for the Anchor to rise depends on the depth of the Ocean: 2 seconds on Coastal Ocean and Brine Shoals, 6 seconds on Swell Ocean, 8 seconds in Rough Ocean and 10 seconds in Hazardous Ocean. The time it takes for it to lower is a third of the raising time.

If an Anchor is hammered, it will leave a boat leak in its place.

A thing to keep in mind is that the anchor will not prevent the boat from drifting away if the sails are still open. They need to be closed, otherwise the boat will still drift away slowly.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Rusty Anchor skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from June 2, 2022 to June 16, 2022.
Loyal
Nautical Collection
Rusty Anchor
After many long years adrift, this anchor has been slowly reclaimed by the sea.

Trivia

  • The Anchor Kit was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • If the Anchor is on land it clinks against the ground.

Gallery

  • A burnt Anchor.
  • Used on ground
  • Deep level0
  • Deep level1
  • Deep level2
  • Deep level3
  • Burnt
  • The stat of a lowered anchor depends on the depth of the ocean. At the right an anchor lowered on land.

“Now I can build an anchor.”
–Wilson
“Ooo, let's build an anchor.”
–Willow
“Is for making big boat weight.”
–Wolfgang
“It's for a burdensome boat anchor.”
–Wendy

–Woodie

–Maxwell

–Warly

“Someone's gotta assemble this anchor, might as well be me.”
–Winona

–Wortox
“Can make boat-stopper!”
–Wurt
“I've got all the supplies ready to build an anchor.”
–Walter
“I guess it might be useful... but I'd rather not to stay in one place for too long.”
–Wanda
The Anchor Kit is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Seafaring Filter, requires two Boards, three Cut Stones and three Ropes to craft, and a Think Tank to prototype.
The Anchor Kit can be deployed on a Boat. The Anchor can then be lowered to prevent the Boat from drifting, or be raised to allow it to move again. The time it takes for the Anchor to rise depends on the depth of the Ocean: 2 seconds on Coastal Ocean and Brine Shoals, 6 seconds on Swell Ocean, 8 seconds in Rough Ocean and 10 seconds in Hazardous Ocean. The time it takes for it to lower is a third of the raising time.
If an Anchor is hammered, it will leave a boat leak in its place.
A thing to keep in mind is that the anchor will not prevent the boat from drifting away if the sails are still open. They need to be closed, otherwise the boat will still drift away slowly.

It is found in the [[Seafaring Filter]], requires two [[Boards]], three [[Cut Stone]]s and three [[Rope]]s to craft, and a [[Think Tank]] to prototype. The Anchor Kit can be deployed on a [[Boat Kit|Boat]]. The Anchor can then be lowered to prevent the Boat from drifting, or be raised to allow it to move again. The time it takes for the Anchor to rise depends on the depth of the Ocean: 2 seconds on [[Ocean#Coastal Ocean|Coastal Ocean]] and [[Ocean#Brine Shoals|Brine Shoals]], 6 seconds on [[Ocean#Swell Ocean|Swell Ocean]], 8 seconds in [[Ocean#Rough Ocean|Rough Ocean]] and 10 seconds in [[Ocean#Hazardous Ocean|Hazardous Ocean]]. The time it takes for it to lower is a third of the raising time. If an Anchor is hammered, it will leave a boat leak in its place. A thing to keep in mind is that the anchor will not prevent the boat from drifting away if the sails are still open. They need to be closed, otherwise the boat will still drift away slowly. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Seafaring Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal Rusty Anchor''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from June 2, 2022 to June 16, 2022.
